title: CBM Mentoring Request
description: Request free business mentoring from Cleveland Business Mentors. Complete this form and our team will match you with an experienced mentor.

fields.label: Email Address
fields.description: We'll use this email to contact you about your mentoring request.

fields.label: Business Name
fields.placeholder: Leave blank if your business is not yet named
fields.description: You may leave this blank if you are in a pre-startup stage.

fields.label: Industry Sector
fields.description: Select the sector that best describes your business.

choices.text: Mining, Quarrying, and Oil and Gas Extraction
choices.value: Mining, Quarrying, and Oil and Gas Extraction

choices.text: Real Estate and Rental and Leasing
choices.value: Real Estate and Rental and Leasing

choices.text: Administrative and Support and Waste Management
choices.value: Administrative and Support and Waste Management

fields.label: NAICS Subsector
fields.description: Optionally select a more specific subsector within your industry.

choices.text: TBD — Full NAICS subsector list to be loaded

fields.note: IMPLEMENTATION NOTE: Full NAICS subsector list (~100 values) must be loaded before go-live. Configure conditional logic to filter by Industry Sector selection in field 10.

fields.label: Mentoring Focus Areas
fields.description: Select all areas where you are seeking mentoring support.

choices.text: TBD — Values to be defined by CBM Leadership

fields.note: IMPLEMENTATION NOTE: Mentoring Focus Areas values must be defined by CBM Leadership and loaded before go-live.

fields.label: Describe Your Mentoring Needs
fields.placeholder: Please describe what you are looking for in a mentoring engagement. What challenges are you facing? What goals do you want to achieve?
fields.description: The more detail you provide, the better we can match you with the right mentor.

fields.content: By submitting this form you agree to be contacted by Cleveland Business Mentors regarding your mentoring request. Your information will be kept confidential and used only for program purposes.

1.name: Default Confirmation
1.message:
Thank you for your mentoring request!

We have received your submission and will be in touch shortly to discuss next steps. Our team typically follows up within 2–3 business days.

If you have questions in the meantime, please contact us at info@clevelandbusinessmentors.org.

1.name: Admin Notification
1.subject: New CBM Mentoring Request — {Name (First):1.3} {Name (Last):1.6}

2.name: Applicant Confirmation
2.subject: We received your mentoring request — Cleveland Business Mentors
2.message:
Dear {Name (First):1.3},

Thank you for submitting a mentoring request to Cleveland Business Mentors. We have received your information and our team will be in touch shortly.

What happens next:
- Our team will review your request
- We will match you with an appropriate mentor based on your needs and industry
- You will be contacted to discuss next steps

This process typically takes 2–3 business days. If you have questions, please contact us at info@clevelandbusinessmentors.org.

Warm regards,
The Cleveland Business Mentors Team
